Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighorhood Development Corporation is present. Represented by Van Hedwall.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Cornelius Williams is present.
Attorney John Weinstrein representing the defendant through limited scope.

Counsels and litigants confer in hallway.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of SEP-10-2012 is vacated.
